channel.title: Latest Posts
channel.description: A blog of my choosing, feel free to explore!

item.title: Update on Nexusmods returning
item.description: I had been unable to login into Nexusmods for months, so there is quite a big backlog there. Great support from their...

item.title: Does AI code well?
item.description: I have been playing around with AI, especially Claude Code and ChatGPT's Codes for a while now and the anwer seems to...

item.title: Wolfgang AI - A Gamemaster in Trouble
item.description: I have spent a lot of time on Wolfgang over the last year. He is built by me and a few contributors, offering writing...

item.title: Project View - an introduction
item.description: I was busy looking for a decent way of sharing my public but hobby project progress with the world and was unable to...

item.title: Turning D&D and Pathfinder into a mixed superhero system
item.description: I have a group of friends who are interested in trying out superhero roleplaying based on custom rulesets that I'm...

item.title: Travian - oh how I have missed you!
item.description: I do play Travian Legends, a browser game that is mostly about strategy and cooperation. I have been playing it on and...

item.title: Ancient Gods And Modern Settings
item.description: I'm currently working on a small project that tries to build a ruleset about divine inheritance and trace strength.

item.title: Mod File Overwriting To Patch
item.description: I recently was fed up with waiting for the Mod Configuration Tool to include my fixes, so I thought I'd just go ahead...

item.title: A question of databases
item.description: I read quite a few posts in X recently, that were promoting single database applications. I am concerned reading this,...
